description: From the manufacturer AV:Link | 4-in-1 USB 3.0 SD Card Reader – Dual USB Type-A & USB-C Connectors – High-Speed SD/MicroSD Adapter for PC, Mac, Android & iPad | Plug & Play Transfer your data quickly and easily with the AV:Link 4-in-1 USB 3.0 SD Card Reader. Designed for speed, convenience, and compatibility, this compact card reader features dual USB Type-A and USB Type-C connectors—so you can use it across all your devices, whether you're working from a laptop, desktop, tablet, or smartphone. Whether you're a photographer transferring RAW files, a videographer offloading 4K footage, or just someone who wants to back up important files, this plug-and-play reader is your perfect companion. With transfer speeds up to 5Gbps and wide card format support, the AV:Link reader offers professional-grade performance in a portable package. Use it as a camera-to-phone adapter, content transfer tool, or simple memory reader. Compatible with Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS (iPads with USB-C). No software or drivers needed—just plug in and go PRODUCT FEATURES: Dual USB-A & USB-C Compatibility | Easily connect to laptops, smartphones, tablets, PCs, Macs, iPads, and Android devices. Perfect for both modern USB-C and traditional USB-A ports Super-Fast Transfer Speeds | Enjoy ultra-fast data transfers up to 5Gbps with USB 3.0. Backward compatible with USB 2.0 and 1.1 for universal use Ideal for Photographers & Creators | Instantly move photos and videos from your DSLR, GoPro, or drone to your phone or computer. A must-have card reader for content creators Compact, Travel-Ready Design | Lightweight and pocket-sized. Take it with you anywhere—perfect for working on-the-go, in the studio, or while travelling Wide Card Support | Supports SD, SDHC, SDXC, MMC, RS-MMC, Micro SD, Micro SDHC, and Micro SDXC cards. Plug & play with no drivers required SPECIFICATION: Connectors: USB 3.0 Type-A and USB Type-C Supported Cards: SDXC, SDHC, SD, MMC, RS-MMC, Micro SDXC, Micro SD, Micro SDHC Data Transfer Rate: Up to 5Gbps Operating Systems: Windows, macOS, iOS (USB-C iPads), Android Dimensions: 11 x 23 x 75mm Weight: 22g BOX CONTAINS: 1 x USB 3.0 Memory Card Reader
